title: Prompt to Associate Dashboard Reports When Creating Metric Relationship
story: As a data analyst, I want to be prompted to also associate the individual reports from a dashboard when I relate that dashboard to a metric, so that I don't have to manually research which reports belong to each dashboard.
description:
When a user creates a relationship between a dashboard and a metric, the system should automatically fetch the dashboard's component reports from Salesforce metadata and prompt the user to select which reports to also associate.

### Workflow
1. User manually adds a dashboard from the analytics tab
2. System runs dashboard analysis and fetches the component reports from Salesforce
3. A modal prompts the user with a multi-select list of reports from the dashboard
4. User selects desired reports via checkboxes
5. Selected reports are added to the reports tab for that metric

### Validation
- Deduplication: if a report is already associated with the metric, it is excluded from the selection list
- Empty state: if no reports are found for the dashboard, either show a message or skip the prompt
acceptance_criteria: Adding a dashboard relationship triggers a follow-up modal with the dashboard's component reports
Reports are fetched from Salesforce dashboard metadata
User can multi-select reports via checkboxes
Selected reports are added to the metric's reports tab
Already-associated reports are excluded from the selection list (deduplication)
Empty dashboard (no reports found) shows a message or suppresses the modal
ux_changes: New follow-up modal after dashboard assignment showing component reports with multi-select checkboxes. Empty state handling with message when no reports found.
middleware_changes: Fetches Salesforce dashboard metadata to extract component report IDs. Deduplication logic to exclude already-associated reports.
api_changes: Calls Salesforce Analytics API to fetch dashboard component report IDs for the follow-up modal.
implementation_notes: Required report IDs from service #2 to be available before this feature could work. Deduplication initially showed duplicate entries that needed fixing — the system was supposed to ignore already-added reports and remove them from the selection list.
comment_summary: Reporter noted report IDs from service #2 were needed first. Developer implemented the follow-up modal but initial testing showed an empty modal. The empty state was caused by dashboards with no reports. A message was added for that case. Deduplication issue was identified and resolved.
